name: O.R.C. Blue Butterfly
description: The O.R.C. Blue Butterfly is the frost-patrol version of the Blue Butterfly in Grounded 2. It keeps the same aerial mobility, but the O.R.C. network makes it far more relentless with chained dives and cold bursts.
behavior: It patrols from the air over O.R.C. routes and open park zones. Unlike the base butterfly, it enters combat much faster and almost always tries to repeat the dive-and-cold-burst cycle.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and uses vertical space extremely well to weave in and out of range. If you let it dictate the pace, you spend more time looking up than hitting back.
interactionWithCreatures: It often serves as aerial support for grounded O.R.C. patrols, swooping in once another unit already pinned you down.
strategy: Spicy remains the best answer. Punish the end of the dive, avoid staying under the chilling gust, and do not chase blindly when it climbs again.

abilities.name: Divebomb Headbutt
abilities.description: It rises up and comes straight back down with a fast frontal slam.

abilities.name: 3-Combo Bite
abilities.description: It chains several short hits once it ends up at your height after the dive.

abilities.name: Chilling Gust
abilities.description: It beats its wings to release a cold gust that makes staying under it dangerous.
